summary: Fixed OpenClaw gateway auth error by adding API keys via env config section in openclaw.json. Previous auth-profiles.json format was incorrect (used kind/apiKey instead of mode/api_key). Gateway now resolves credentials from env vars at runtime.

details.problem: Gateway reported 'No API key found for provider anthropic' because launchd-managed process doesn't inherit shell env vars, and auth-profiles.json had wrong format
details.solution: Added env section to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY
